title: RG10 8DJ, Thames Water Utilities Limited: partial surrender issued - EPR/UP3737QP/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Wargrave Sewage Treatment Works (CHP Engine)   Permit number: EPR/UP3737QP/S003   "
